title: MontySecurity C2 Tracker
description:
The MontySecurity C2-Tracker is a free, community-driven IOC feed that leverages Shodan searches to identify active Command & Control, botnet, and malware infrastructure across the internet.

This connector imports C2-Tracker data into OpenCTI, creating Malware entities and associated IP address observables with indicators relationships. It provides visibility into active adversary infrastructure for proactive threat detection and blocking.
short_description: MontySecurity C2-Tracker connector imports active C2, botnet, and malware infrastructure IPs identified via Shodan, linked to their associated malware families.
